name: windows-webnn-onnxrt-green
description: Known-green baseline for Windows WebNN/ONNX Runtime build lane (pending first green build).
notes: This baseline is pending the first green build with ENABLE_WEBNN=ON.
WebNN requires ONNX Runtime as the inference backend on Windows.
ONNX Runtime is installed via vcpkg manifest feature 'onnxruntime'.
Both ENABLE_WEBNN and ENABLE_WEBGPU are on for WebGPU interop testing.
Populate greenBuild fields after the first successful build passes all acceptance criteria.
